amend_order.source_boundary: official api.hollaex.com demo/API profile has no verified in-place amend or cancel-replace endpoint mapped into the shared gateway model

place_order_list.source_boundary: no verified OCO/OTO/order-list endpoint is mapped for the official demo/API profile

batch_place_orders.source_boundary: no verified native batch place endpoint is mapped for the official demo/API profile

batch_cancel_orders.source_boundary: no verified native cancel-by-list or batch cancel endpoint is mapped for the official demo/API profile

cancel_all_orders.source_boundary: DELETE /v2/order/all is pinned as an audit/core-trading request spec only and must not be exposed as live runtime
